case_title: CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. LUCIA MENDEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $70.99) SERVED APR-23-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, LUCIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT LUCIA MENDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, LUCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PACIFIC LIGHTHOUSE PARTNERS AFP WASEEM AFZAL ON 12/05/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDEZ, LUCIA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,070.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, LUCIA
